svg.title: Roots Clinic – Full Application Workflow
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the complete workflow of Roots Clinic from authentication through patient visit, billing, and reporting

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about authentication and role-based access in Roots Clinic')
sendPrompt('How does patient registration work in Roots Clinic?')
sendPrompt('How does patient search and lookup work?')
sendPrompt('How does appointment booking work in Roots Clinic?')
sendPrompt('How does the waiting room and arrival tracking work?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a patient is called in to the treatment room?')
sendPrompt('What does the doctor do during the treatment session?')
sendPrompt('How does radiology work in Roots Clinic?')
sendPrompt('How does appointment completion and status update work?')
sendPrompt('How is the patient EHR and visit record created?')
sendPrompt('How does inventory deduction work during a procedure?')
sendPrompt('How does invoice generation work in the finance module?')
sendPrompt('How does insurance claims handling work?')
sendPrompt('How is payment recorded in Roots Clinic?')
sendPrompt('What does the finance dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('What does the command center dashboard aggregate?')
sendPrompt('What does inventory management track over time?')
